race.comment: A couple of key chances have come out this morning and it leaves DRONE ATTACK (1) on top. She can mix her form a bit but closed off strongly here last time out in a similar race and a repeat effort goes close. Drawn wide but that probably won't be too bad by this time of the day. TSARINE (12) resumes. She's a handy enough mare who will be better over a touch further but can be strong late having contested stronger races last time in. SHE DARESTHE DEVIL (10) is consistent and has a good heavy track record. The form around her past few should hold up here although barrier one might be tricky for the 4kg claimer. MISS CASTELVECCHIO (8) resumes having gone to the paddock an easy winner at Stony Creek, she'll need every bit of this trip but will be charging late.
